data.content: Removed all prompt-guidance code from doctor.ts: constants, checkPromptGuidance function, prompt-guidance case in applyFix, readPromptTemplate, promptProfileTemplateFor, fileExists helper, and PROMPT_GUIDANCE_FIX_OPTIONS. Kept listWorkflowsSafe and fallbackPromptProfileForRepoPath (used by checkMemoryImplementationCompatibility). Updated all 3 test files: doctor.test.ts, doctor-coverage.test.ts, doctor-applyfix.test.ts. Stream event count reduced from 13 to 12. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 1999 tests, build). Commit 1a591cd2 pushed to origin/main.
